name: Corn-Chilies-Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Drained whole kernel canned corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into the bread machine in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and press "Start".
3. Unless otherwise noted, ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
4. This can be mixed on manual setting of the bread machine.
5. After second kneading, remove dough from the machine and divide into two equal portions.
6. Place each portion in small loaf pans and cover.
7. Let rise for 45 minutes to 1 hour until doubled.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
